SeaGlow · Signature Variations

Fifty crests, one signature

The flowing script wordmark with the watery teal→ocean→navy gradient and spaced “Sea Moss Gel” tagline, each crowned by a distinct botanical or coastal icon. The first ten are set in Great Vibes; the second ten switch to Allura — softer and rounder — for fresh inspiration.

Great Vibes 01–10 · flourishing signature
01Sprig TuftGracilaria tuft crest
02Cresting CurlWave plus foam flecks
03Specimen CirclePressed-specimen roundel
04Laurel CrestMirrored sprigs
05Coral FanBold gorgonian
06Layered SwellTide contours
07Rising GlowDawn half-disc and sprig
08Single FrondOne sculptural strand
09Arc and SprigCrescent over sprig
10Diamond EmblemSprig in a lozenge
Allura 11–20 · softer, rounder cut
11Twin SprigsAllura - paired specimens
12Swash and SprigAllura - calligraphic flourish
13Hexagon FrameAllura - faceted specimen

15Wide FanAllura - spreading fan
16Oval SpecimenAllura - portrait roundel
17Double CrestAllura - twin curls
18BoutonniereAllura - sprig and curls
19CrescentAllura - moon over tide
20Laurel WreathAllura - leafy laurel
Fresh Icons 21–30 · ten distinct marks
